Why Coach Du

World-class experience, translated into athlete-first development

Coach Du combines elite competitive experience with technical instruction, mentorship and an ability to connect with young athletes. The objective is not only better performance, but athletes who understand their bodies, trust the process and compete with composure.

01 — Proven at the highest level

Experience athletes can grow into

Lessons earned through NCAA championship and international competition are translated into clear, age-appropriate coaching.

02 — Personal investment

Coached as an individual

Every athlete receives honest feedback, appropriate progressions and a development path built around their current needs.

03 — Beyond performance

Skills that transfer into life

Trust, composure, gratitude and execution shape how athletes train, compete, respond to setbacks and grow.

Proven Athlete Development

Results that tell a bigger story

Each story reflects technical improvement, consistent coaching and genuine investment in the person behind the athlete.

The Du Airlines Development Method

Developing the complete athlete

Four connected areas guide every session, clinic and partnership. The emphasis changes with the athlete's age, sport, training history and goals.

Waypoint 01

Speed

  • Acceleration
  • First-step quickness
  • Sprint posture
  • Force application
  • Running efficiency
Waypoint 02

Movement

  • Coordination and rhythm
  • Balance and body awareness
  • Deceleration
  • Change of direction
  • Movement confidence
Waypoint 03

Explosiveness

  • Reactive ability
  • Horizontal power
  • Age-appropriate plyometrics
  • Efficient force production
  • Multi-directional movement
Waypoint 04

Mindset

  • Confidence
  • Composure
  • Coachability
  • Discipline
  • Trust in the process

Who We Develop

One standard. Three sport pathways

Coach Du develops the physical qualities that help athletes express their sport skills more effectively—without replacing their team or position coach.

Soccer

Faster and more complete movers

  • First-step acceleration
  • Sprint mechanics and running efficiency
  • Deceleration and body control
  • Change of direction
  • Explosive movement and confidence
Football

Explosiveness that transfers to the field

  • Acceleration and first-step quickness
  • Efficient sprint posture
  • Horizontal force production
  • Multi-directional movement
  • Reactive power and body control
Track & Field

Technical speed and jumps development

  • Sprint development
  • Long jump and triple jump
  • Approach rhythm and board accuracy
  • Takeoff and phase mechanics
  • Competition preparation and mindset

For Teams, Clubs & Schools

A trusted speed and movement resource that strengthens your program

Du Airlines works alongside existing coaches and performance staff. Every partnership is shaped around the organization's athletes, schedule, goals and current resources.

Performance Development

  • Team speed and movement sessions
  • Short- and multiweek development blocks
  • Ongoing support across every phase of the year
  • Athlete evaluations and technical feedback

Clinics, Education & Specialist Support

  • Clinics and camps
  • Horizontal-jump specialist coaching
  • Coach collaboration
  • Parent and athlete education

The Du Airlines Standard

How we train. How we compete. How we grow.

Trust

Believe in the process, the preparation and the people committed to your growth.

Composure

Control what you can control and respond with confidence under pressure.

Gratitude

Respect the opportunity, the work and every person who supports the journey.

Execute

Turn preparation into disciplined action—one rep, one session and one competition at a time.

What your athlete experiences

Coaching designed around the athlete, not the average

Maximum 5 athletes per session

Personalized small-group coaching

Small group by design, not by limitation. Every athlete receives individual attention, technical feedback, and a structured development plan built around their event and their goals.

  • Speed development
  • Sprint mechanics
  • Long jump coaching
  • Triple jump coaching
  • Video analysis
  • Explosive power
  • Competition prep
  • Bodyweight strength

What your athlete gains

  • Runs faster
  • Jumps higher & farther
  • Builds explosive power
  • Sharper sprint mechanics
  • Cleaner LJ & TJ technique
  • Moves more efficiently
  • Reduced injury risk
  • Greater confidence
  • Real discipline
  • Competitive mindset

How it works

  • Every session has a plan
  • Individual technical feedback
  • Monthly development roadmap
  • Video analysis built in
  • Progress tracked over time
  • Monthly parent updates

Athlete Success Story

From Plumtree, Zimbabwe to NCAA Division I

Triple Jump: 13.00m → 15.86m (42'8" → 52'0")
Coach Du helped take me from a 13.00m triple jumper in Plumtree to a 15.86m NCAA Division I athlete at the University of Oklahoma. When we first started working together, I had potential, but I lacked exposure, technical knowledge, confidence and experience. Coach Du helped me understand the triple jump technically, but his impact went far beyond athletics. He taught me discipline, confidence, composure under pressure and how to trust the process. He never treated me like just another athlete. He coached me like a younger brother—honest, demanding, supportive and always believing in me before many others did. The moment I knew the work was paying off was when I jumped 15.44m and became a Zimbabwean national champion. Today, I compete at the NCAA Division I level with a personal best of 15.86m, after becoming a 2× NJCAA All-American. Coach Du became more than a coach to me. He became a mentor and a brother. Working with him is about more than training. He genuinely cares about your development as both an athlete and a person. If you trust him and commit to the process, you will grow in sport and in life.
— NCAA Division I Triple Jumper, University of Oklahoma · 2× NJCAA All-American
Athlete Success Story

Two Events. Two Personal Bests. One Breakthrough.

Triple Jump: 14.27m → 15.40m · Long Jump: 6.50m → 7.08m
Coach Du helped take me from 14.27m to 15.40m in the triple jump and from 6.50m to 7.08m in the long jump. He transformed every part of my performance. I became faster, stronger, more explosive and more capable of controlling the speed I brought into the board. He taught me how to run through the board, maintain better posture, strike underneath my hips, use my arms effectively and remain patient throughout my phases. My breakthrough came at the U20 Southern African Championships in Mauritius, where I produced personal bests in both events on the same day. Coach Du also taught me that track and field is as mental as it is physical. He helped me remain calm under pressure, recover from disappointing performances, manage negative thoughts and trust the work I had completed. The word that best describes my experience is composure. He taught me that composure means controlling what you can control, trusting your preparation and remaining grateful for the opportunity to compete. Coach Du became more than a coach to me. He became a mentor and father figure who helped me grow both as an athlete and as a person.
— Future Loughborough University Student-Athlete
Athlete Success Story

From District Level to National Championship Qualifier

800m: 2:10 → 2:01
When I first started working with Coach Du, I was one of the better athletes at my school, but I usually struggled to progress beyond the district level. Through more structured and consistent training, I improved significantly and qualified for the national championships—my greatest achievement in athletics so far. Coach Du helped improve my stride mechanics, running form, pacing, aerobic endurance and speed. One of the biggest moments of my season came at the NAAZ championships, when I tracked down my competitors over the final 100 meters and produced a new personal best. His coaching was different because he listened to me. He asked which areas I believed needed improvement and communicated with me consistently from the beginning of our training through my first and final races of the season. He also helped me believe in myself when I did not fully believe in my own ability. He reminded me how significant my progress was, helped me approach my competitors with greater confidence and gave me professional athletes to study and learn from. The word that best represents my experience is trust. Coach Du coached me online across different time zones, consistently provided my sessions and took time to communicate with me throughout the season. He is patient, supportive and brings an energy that makes athletics enjoyable. His coaching helped me improve as an athlete, but the lessons and personal experiences he shared also helped me grow outside of sport.
— 800m Athlete, Kutama College
